== Sleuth Doom ♂ ==
A detective from hell. Weak as he is, he is good at lying and controls some demon minions.

===Begin Friendship ===
To obtain Sleuth Doom, fully upgrade (level 30) [[Murika]] South hero, Sleuth Doom.

===☆☆☆ > ★☆☆===
After 7 letters back and forth, Sleuth Doom will show up at Home Base and gift 10k B-tads.

===★☆☆ > ★★☆ ===
After 8 letters back and forth, Muscle Ran will show up for a fight. After winning the battle and 3 more letters, Sleuth Doom will gift 20k B-tads.

{|class="wikitable"
!Enemy!!ATK!!DEF!!HP!!Special Stats!!Weakness!!Rewards
|-
|Muscle Ran
|40,299
|34,684
|804,078
|HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
|ART 11,990
|Toner +50 
|}

===★★☆ > ★★★===
After 4 letters back and forth, Sleuth Doom will request 100k B-tads. After 3 more letters, Detective Di & Aide Fang will show up for a fight. Once they are defeated, 4 more letters will prompt Sleuth Doom to permanently move in with his minion, Imp.

{|class="wikitable"
!Enemy!!ATK!!DEF!!HP!!Special Stats!!Weakness!!Rewards 
|-
|Detective Di & Aide Fang
|64,992
|55,936
|1,495,849
|HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50% 
|CIV 15,880
|Wish Coin +3
|}

==Rent==
[[File:Sleuth Doom rent.png|frameless|left]]

Sleuth Doom rent is collected on '''Friday''' and found as a soul hovering in the room.

 '''Normal Rent''': A random small soul of Chaos

 '''Rare Rent''': ??

 '''1-time Rent''': ??

{|class="wikitable"
|+Possible Souls obtained during weekly Rent
|-
!Soul
!Offering Duration
|-
|<span style="color:var(--red-text)">Soul of Evil Mage</span>||2h
|-
|<span style="color:var(--red-text)">Soul of Headless Rider</span>||2h
|}

{{clear}}

== Relics==
Upgrading these will earn B-tads!

{| class="mw-collapsible wikitable"  
!Relic Tier
!Reward
|-
|★
|5k B-tads
|-
|★★
|5k B-tads
|-
|★★★
|5k B-tads
|-
|★★★★
|10k B-tads
|-
|★★★★★
|20k B-tads
|-
|★★★★★★
|40k B-tads
|}

{| class="wiki-table" style="width:100%; text-align:center;" 
!style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);"|{{Reimg|Moai}}{{Relink|Moai}}
!style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);"|{{Reimg|Templar Emblem}}{{Relink|Templar Emblem}}
!style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);"|{{Reimg|Blood of Dracula}}{{Relink|Blood of Dracula}}
!style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);"|{{Reimg|Sorron's Eye}}{{Relink|Sorron's Eye}}
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);"|{{Reimg|Horn of Heimdall}}{{Relink|Horn of Heimdall}}
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);"|{{Reimg|Eye of Akamoddo}}{{Relink|Eye of Akamoddo}}
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);"|{{Reimg|Scale of Anubis}}{{Relink|Scale of Anubis}}
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);"|{{Reimg|The Key of Solomon}}{{Relink|The Key of Solomon}}
|}

==Detective's Demon Pact==
Looks like an official contract but it is filled with traps. Once signing it, you'll be enslaved for the rest of your life...

{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!Level
!Research Skill<br>Required
!B-tad Cost
!Skill 1
!Skill 2
|-
|1||0||0||Snail ART +5||Demon Minion Recovery SPD +0.3%
|-
|2||180||2k||Snail ART +10||Demon Minion Recovery SPD +0.6%
|-
|3||190||4.5k||Snail ART +15||Demon Minion Recovery SPD +0.9% 
|-
|4||200||8k||Snail ART +20||Demon Minion Recovery SPD +1.2%
|-
|5||210||12.5k||Snail ART +25||Demon Minion Recovery SPD +1.5%
|-
|6||220||18k||Snail ART +30||Demon Minion Recovery SPD +1.8%
|-
|7||230||24.5k||Snail ART +35||Demon Minion Recovery SPD +2.1%
|-
|8||240||32k||Snail ART +40||Demon Minion Recovery SPD +2.4%
|-
|9||250||40.5k||Snail ART +45||Demon Minion Recovery SPD +2.7%
|-
|10||260||50k||Snail ART +50||Demon Minion Recovery SPD +3%
|-
|11||270||60.5k||Snail ART +55||Demon Minion Recovery SPD +3.3%
|-
|12||285||72k||Snail ART +60||Demon Minion Recovery SPD +3.6%
|-
|13||300||84.5k||Snail ART +65||Demon Minion Recovery SPD +3.9%
|-
|14||315||98k||Snail ART +70||Demon Minion Recovery SPD +4.2%
|-
|15||330||112k||Snail ART +75||Demon Minion Recovery SPD +4.5% 
|-
|16||345||123k||Snail ART +80||Demon Minion Recovery SPD +4.8%
|-
|17||360||144k||Snail ART +85||Demon Minion Recovery SPD +5.1%
|-
|18||375||162k||Snail ART +90||Demon Minion Recovery SPD +5.4%
|-
|19||390||180k||Snail ART +95||Demon Minion Recovery SPD +5.7%
|-
|20||400||200k||Snail ART +100||Demon Minion Recovery SPD +6%
|-
|21||420||220k||Snail ART +105||Demon Minion Recovery SPD +6.3%
|-
|22||440||242k||Snail ART +110||Demon Minion Recovery SPD +6.6%
|-
|23||460||264k||Snail ART +115||Demon Minion Recovery SPD +6.9%
|-
|24||480||285k||Snail ART +120||Demon Minion Recovery SPD +7.2%
|-
|25||500||309k||Snail ART +125||Demon Minion Recovery SPD +7.5%
|-
|26||520||333k||Snail ART +130||Demon Minion Recovery SPD +7.8%
|-
|27||540||357k||Snail ART +135||Demon Minion Recovery SPD +8.1%
|-
|28||560||381k||Snail ART +140||Demon Minion Recovery SPD +8.4%
|-
|29||580||405k||Snail ART +145||Demon Minion Recovery SPD +8.7% 
|-
|30||600||429k||Snail ART +150||Demon Minion Recovery SPD +9%
|}

==Commander ==
A good commander can make the troops more effective!

Commander can only be leveled up as far as Detective's Demon Pact is. 

{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!Level
!B-tad Cost
!Skill 1
!Skill 2
|-
|1||0||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Imps in battle, Troop RUSH +10
|-
|2||4k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Imps in battle, Troop RUSH +20
|-
|3||6k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Imps in battle, Troop RUSH +30
|-
|4||8k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Imps in battle, Troop RUSH +40
|-
|5||10k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Imps in battle, Troop RUSH +50
|-
|6||12k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Imps in battle, Troop RUSH +60
|-
|7||14k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Imps in battle, Troop RUSH +70
|-
|8||16k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Imps in battle, Troop RUSH +80
|-
|9||18k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Imps in battle, Troop RUSH +90
|-
|10||20k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Imps in battle, Troop RUSH +100
|-
|11||22k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Imps in battle, Troop RUSH +110
|-
|12||24k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Imps in battle, Troop RUSH +120
|-
|13||26k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Imps in battle, Troop RUSH +130
|-
|14||28k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Imps in battle, Troop RUSH +140
|-
|15||30k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Imps in battle, Troop RUSH +150
|-
|16||32k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Imps in battle, Troop RUSH +160
|-
|17||34k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Imps in battle, Troop RUSH +170
|-
|18||36k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Imps in battle, Troop RUSH +180
|-
|19||38k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Imps in battle, Troop RUSH +190
|-
|20||40k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Imps in battle, Troop RUSH +200
|-
|21||42k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Imps in battle, Troop RUSH +210
|-
|22||44k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Imps in battle, Troop RUSH +220
|-
|23||46k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Imps in battle, Troop RUSH +230
|-
|24||48k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Imps in battle, Troop RUSH +240
|-
|25||50k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Imps in battle, Troop RUSH +250
|-
|26||55k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Imps in battle, Troop RUSH +260
|-
|27||60k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Imps in battle, Troop RUSH +270
|-
|28||65k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Imps in battle, Troop RUSH +280
|-
|29||70k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Imps in battle, Troop RUSH +290
|-
|30||75k||Demon Minion MAX +1||Per 10 Imps in battle, Troop RUSH +300
|}

== Research Ability ==
Below is a table of the research manual cost to upgrade each research gene. Sleuth Doom specializes in '''Demon Gene''' and therefore the research manual cost for the Demon is halved. 

{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!Level
!Manuals Required 
|-
|1-10||1
|-
|11-20||2
|-
|21-30||3
|-
|31-40||4
|-
|61-70||20
|-
|71-80||40
|-
|81-90||60
|-
|91-95||80
|-
|97||200
|-
|98||400
|-
|99||600
|-
|100||800
|}

== Minion - Imp==
These untamed denizens of Hell never stop making pranks. Absolute strength is the only thing they will willingly obey!

===Special Ability - Demonic Strength===
Per 10 Imps in battle, Troop ATK +10 (multiplied by minion level)

===Minion Relics===
Upgrading these relics will buff your Imps!

{| class="mw-collapsible wikitable"
!Name
!★☆☆☆☆☆
!★★☆☆☆☆
!★★★☆☆☆
!★★★★☆☆
!★★★★★☆
!★★★★★★
|-
!style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);" |{{reimg|Moai}}<br>{{relink|Moai}}
|Imp HP +1%
|Imp DEF +1%
|Imp ATK +1% 
|Imp RUSH +1%
|
|
|-
!style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);" |{{reimg|Templar Emblem}}<br>{{relink|Templar Emblem}}
|Imp HP +1%
|Imp DEF +1%
|Imp ATK +1%
|Imp RUSH +1%
|
|
|-
!style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);" |{{reimg|Blood of Dracula}}<br>{{relink|Blood of Dracula}}
|Imp HP +2%
|Imp DEF +2%
|Imp ATK +2%
|Imp RUSH +2%
|Imp All Stats +3%
|
|-
!style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);" |{{reimg|Sorron's Eye}}<br>{{relink|Sorron's Eye}}
|Imp HP +2%
|Imp DEF +2%
|Imp ATK +2%
|Imp RUSH +2%
|Imp All Stats +3%
|
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{reimg|Horn of Heimdall}}<br>{{relink|Horn of Heimdall}}
|Imp RUSH +4%
|Imp RUSH +4% 
|Imp RUSH +4%
|Imp RUSH +4%
|Imp RUSH +4%
|Imp RUSH +4%
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{reimg|Eye of Akamoddo}}<br>{{relink|Eye of Akamoddo}}
|Imp DEF +4%
|Imp DEF +4%
|Imp DEF +4%
|Imp DEF +4%
|Imp DEF +4%
|Imp DEF +4%
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{reimg|Scale of Anubis}}<br>{{relink|Scale of Anubis}}
|Imp HP +4%
|Imp HP +4%
|Imp HP +4%
|Imp HP +4%
|Imp HP +4%
|Imp HP +4%
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{reimg|The Key of Solomon}}<br>{{relink|The Key of Solomon}}
|Imp ATK +4%
|Imp ATK +4%
|Imp ATK +4%
|Imp ATK +4%
|Imp ATK +4%
|Imp ATK +4%
|}

[[Category:Partners]]
